backend-spring/backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK version.
backend-spring/backend/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the build targets Java 17, failing to leverage Java 21 features and potentially causing incompatibility with Java 21-specific libraries or runtime expectations.

backend-spring/backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Add the release configuration to the Maven compiler plugin to enforce source and target compatibility with the specified Java version.
backend-spring/backend/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the compiler may not strictly enforce Java 21 language features and API usage, leading to potential runtime issues or inconsistent compilation behavior.
